Name: hyprland
Description: A dynamic tiling Wayland compositor based on wlroots that doesn't sacrifice on its looks.
Depends On: pixman wayland-protocols libdisplay-info cairo pango libinput libxkbcommon pixman wayland seatd tomlplusplus libdrm vulkan-icd-loader libegl hyprcursor hyprutils glslang aquamarine libxcurcommon-compat hyprgraphics re2
